Why Xite

The difference is in the details.

Fixed price. No surprises.

Every project is scoped and quoted upfront. You know exactly what you're paying before a single wireframe is drawn.

Boutique quality, without the wait.

No 12-week agency timelines. Most projects are live within four to six weeks of kickoff.

Built for results, not just aesthetics.

Beautiful design that's also fast, accessible, and optimised to turn visitors into enquiries.

Powered by AI, refined by craft.

AI-augmented production means we deliver more, faster — without compromising the details that matter.

Process

Four steps to launch.

01

Discovery

A focused conversation about your goals, audience, and what the site needs to do.

02

Design

Full visual design delivered for review before a single line of code is written.

03

Build

Clean, fast, accessible code. Mobile-first, SEO-ready, and built to perform.

04

Launch

Smooth deployment, post-launch testing, and a site you're proud to share.

Ready to build something exceptional?
